option.value:
{% extends 'management/base.html' %} {% block content %}

Incident Management

View and filter all reported emergency events.

{{ incydenty.count }} Total Cases
Reset Filters
{% for incydent in incydenty %} {% empty %} {% endfor %}
Incident ID Type Date Reported Priority Status
INC-00{{ incydent.id }} {{ incydent.typ }} {{ incydent.data_zgloszenia|date:"Y-m-d H:i" }} {% if incydent.priorytet == 'krytyczny' %} Critical {% elif incydent.priorytet == 'wysoki' %} High {% elif incydent.priorytet == 'średni' %} Medium {% elif incydent.priorytet == 'niski' %} Low {% else %} {{ incydent.priorytet }} {% endif %} {% if incydent.status == 'zgłoszony' %}REPORTED {% elif incydent.status == 'w toku' %}IN PROGRESS {% elif incydent.status == 'zakończony' %}CLOSED {% else %}{{ incydent.status|upper }}{% endif %}
No incidents found matching these filters.
{% endblock %}

INC-00{{ incydent.id }} {{ incydent.typ }} {{ incydent.data_zgloszenia|date:"Y-m-d H:i" }} {% if incydent.priorytet == 'krytyczny' %} Critical {% elif incydent.priorytet == 'wysoki' %} High {% elif incydent.priorytet == 'średni' %} Medium {% elif incydent.priorytet == 'niski' %} Low {% else %} {{ incydent.priorytet }} {% endif %} {% if incydent.status == 'zgłoszony' %}REPORTED {% elif incydent.status == 'w toku' %}IN PROGRESS {% elif incydent.status == 'zakończony' %}CLOSED {% else %}{{ incydent.status|upper }}{% endif %}
No incidents found matching these filters.
